intended_use: PowerLook Density Assessment is a software application intended for use with digital breast tomosynthesis synthesized 2D images from tomosynthesis exams. PowerLook Density Assessment provides an ACR B
intended_use_full: PowerLook Density Assessment is a software application intended for use with digital breast tomosynthesis synthesized 2D images from tomosynthesis exams. PowerLook Density Assessment provides an ACR BI-RADS Atlas 5th Edition breast density category to aid health care professionals in the assessment of breast tissue composition. PowerLook Density Assessment produces adjunctive information. It is not a diagnostic aid.
target_condition: Breast density assessment in women undergoing mammography
other_metrics: Performance described as 'above the desired performance' on confusion matrices for all three datasets; no specific quantitative metrics reported
